items.title_en: In deeply red Oklahoma, minimum wage’s biggest 2026 election cycle fight is about to be decided
items.title_zh: 在深红色的俄克拉荷马州，最低工资最大的2026年选举周期之争即将决定
items.desc_en: Oklahomans will soon vote on a measure to double the minimum wage, an election issue that may reflect the economic mood and inflation outlook across parties.
items.desc_zh: 俄克拉荷马州很快将就一项将最低工资提高一倍的措施进行投票，这一选举问题可能反映各党派的经济情绪和通胀前景。

items.title_en: Israel seizes castle in Lebanon as it expands ground offensive
items.title_zh: 以色列扩大地面攻势夺取黎巴嫩城堡
items.desc_en: The Israeli military says everyone south of the Zahrani river should leave, after it captured the strategic Beaufort Castle.
items.desc_zh: 以色列军方表示，在占领了具有战略意义的博福特城堡后，扎赫拉尼河以南的所有人都应该离开。

items.desc_en: Maj Gen Rabe Abubakar's kidnapping highlights continuing security challenges facing parts of the country.
items.desc_zh: 拉贝·阿布巴卡尔少将的绑架事件凸显了该国部分地区持续面临的安全挑战。

items.title_en: SoftBank plans 75 billion euros of AI investments in France, as Europe struggles to catch up with U.S. and China

items.title_en: How Putin became master of the image
items.title_zh: 普京如何成为形象大师

items.title_en: DOJ seeks Judge Eleanor Ross recusal in Georgia election case, citing reports she was disciplined
items.title_zh: 司法部寻求埃莉诺·罗斯法官回避佐治亚州选举案，理由是有报道称她受到纪律处分
items.desc_en: The DOJ is suing Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensberger over his refusal to give the department election records.
items.desc_zh: 美国司法部正在起诉佐治亚州国务卿布拉德·拉芬斯伯格拒绝提供该部门的选举记录。

items.title_en: Oscar-winning Star Wars editor Marcia Lucas dies aged 80
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡获奖《星球大战》剪辑师玛西娅·卢卡斯去世，享年 80 岁
items.desc_en: The film editor and ex-wife of director George Lucas was widely recognised as a pivotal creative force behind the original space trilogy.
items.desc_zh: 电影剪辑师兼导演乔治·卢卡斯的前妻被广泛认为是原始太空三部曲背后的关键创作力量。

items.title_en: Trump attacks artists dropping out of US Freedom 250 concert and mulls appearing himself
items.title_zh: 特朗普攻击退出美国自由 250 音乐会的艺术家并考虑亲自出席
items.desc_en: Performers Young MC, Poison frontman Bret Michaels and country singer Martina McBride raised concerns the event will be political.
items.desc_zh: 表演者 Young MC、Poison 主唱 Bret Michaels 和乡村歌手 Martina McBride 担心该活动将具有政治性。

items.title_en: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'alarming', charity warns, as WHO chief visits worst-hit area
items.title_zh: 慈善机构警告说，埃博拉在刚果民主共和国的传播“令人震惊”，世界卫生组织主席访问了受灾最严重的地区
items.desc_en: Médicins Sans Frontières says that never before has an Ebola outbreak recorded so many cases so soon after its declaration.
items.desc_zh: 无国界医生组织表示，埃博拉疫情爆发后从未出现过如此之快的病例记录。

items.title_en: Italy bans Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts over security concerns
items.title_zh: 出于安全考虑，意大利禁止坎耶·韦斯特和特拉维斯·斯科特举行音乐会
items.desc_en: Local authorities say the cancellation of other West concerts had played a role in the decision.
items.desc_zh: 地方当局表示，其他西方音乐会的取消也是这一决定的原因之一。

items.title_en: Two months, $2.6 billion: How NASA ETF turned SpaceX IPO access into a hot retail trade
items.title_zh: 两个月，26 亿美元：NASA ETF 如何将 SpaceX IPO 变成热门零售交易
items.desc_en: With Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO ahead, retail investors are rushing into space-themed ETFs including NASA which offers direct access to the rocket company.
items.desc_zh: 随着埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 的临近，散户投资者纷纷涌入太空主题 ETF，其中包括 NASA，后者提供直接投资这家火箭公司的机会。

items.title_en: At least 3.5 million people have lost food stamp access as Trump's 'big beautiful bill' cuts take effect, analysis finds
items.title_zh: 分析发现，随着特朗普的“美丽大法案”削减生效，至少 350 万人失去了食品券
items.desc_en: Even as Americans confront higher costs, millions of people have lost Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program food benefits.
items.desc_zh: 尽管美国人面临更高的成本，但仍有数百万人失去了补充营养援助计划的食品福利。

items.title_en: Travelers to Europe may be leaving money on the table. Here's why
items.title_zh: 前往欧洲的游客可能会留下金钱。这就是为什么
items.desc_en: Travelers to Europe who buy certain merchandise can claim a refund of the value-added taxes they pay.
items.desc_zh: 前往欧洲购买某些商品的游客可以要求退还所缴纳的增值税。

items.title_en: Stocks including Nvidia and Apple are top picks as market run-up continues, Bank of America says

items.desc_zh: 美国银行列出了六月份最喜欢购买的一些股票。

items.title_en: Micron is one of the most overbought stocks after this week’s rally to new highs
items.title_zh: 美光科技是本周反弹至新高后最超买的股票之一
items.desc_en: Investors poured love into stocks such as Micron Technology and Dell Technologies this week.
items.desc_zh: 本周，投资者纷纷买入美光科技和戴尔科技等股票。

items.title_en: Oil exports through the Strait of Hormuz might not return to levels seen before the Iran war
items.title_zh: 通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油出口可能不会恢复到伊朗战争前的水平
items.desc_en: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has seriously challenged freedom of navigation in the sea lane, raising questions about the future.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁严重挑战了海上航道的航行自由，引发了对未来的疑问。

items.title_en: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
items.title_zh: 美国、英国和澳大利亚开发水下无人机技术
items.desc_en: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.
items.desc_zh: 该技术是根据奥库斯军事协议开发的，旨在保护海底电缆并增强海军防御。

items.title_en: Analysis: An end to the Iran war may be just the beginning of a new era of U.S. inequality

items.desc_en: Stocks have boomed while consumers have paid the costs of high energy prices.

items.desc_zh: 5 月 20 日进入狭窄隧道寻找黄金的 7 名村民中，有 2 人至今下落不明。

items.desc_zh: 根据 CNBC 官方球队估值，全球 30 支最有价值的足球队平均身价为 26.6 亿美元。

items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。

items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.title_en: King's College team wins access to cutting-edge Google quantum chip
items.title_zh: 国王学院团队获得尖端谷歌量子芯片的使用权
items.desc_en: King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.
items.desc_zh: 伦敦国王学院的研究人员希望该芯片能够帮助回答有关最重要的自然过程的先前无法回答的问题。

items.title_zh: 色情公司因年龄检查失败被 Ofcom 罚款 60 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产

items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。
